summary: A postmortem meeting is scheduled for Friday at 3 PM to discuss an API incident. Logs need to be shared before the meeting.
key_points: Postmortem meeting scheduled for Friday at 3 PM.
Logs must be shared before the meeting.
SRE will prepare timeline and logs by Friday at 12 PM.
Confirmation needed on whether the product team is invited.
open_questions: Is the product team invited to the meeting?
